title: XPeng Inc. ADR Retail Investor Sentiment and Activity
text: XPeng's retail investor sentiment is positive according to TipRanks data. In the last 7 days, 0.7% of TipRanks' retail investors changed their holding of XPEV. Investors allocate an average of 4.59% of their portfolios to XPEV, based on 824,099 active investor portfolios. This allocation level is significant, indicating moderate retail investor confidence in the company. However, sentiment has been volatile relative to company performance, with retail investors showing concern about delivery metrics and technical indicators suggesting caution in the near term. The Barchart Technical Opinion rating is a 80% Sell with an average short term outlook on maintaining the current direction.
